title: ModActiv S1
description: Modactiv S1, a Random complex mod modpack made for fun in my 13s
body:
The First ever modpack i've made.

It Combines technical mods as well as decorative mods but is overall kinda random.
Though i'd release it for fun and to also show my progress as for making modpacks :)

Here are some ingame screenshots :)

![Modactiv s1 prev1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c8bdece52aa3826eb9a160144e335bcbb613d2d.jpeg)

![Modactiv s1 prev2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/322c5bea2eab2005dc47ab2833e0af2c78b136ba.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Modpack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Error Messages, Game Not Launching, Specific mods crashing the game...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !

Here is also a list of the mods that aren't available on Modrinth :

Iron chest : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iron-chests](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iron-chests)

Baubles : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles)

Aroma 1997s Dimensional world : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aroma1997s-dimensional-world](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aroma1997s-dimensional-world)

Aroma 1997 core : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aroma1997core](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aroma1997core)

Chisel : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chisel](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chisel)

Simple world timer : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-world-timer](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-world-timer)

CTM : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ctm](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ctm)

Bibliocraft : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bibliocraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bibliocraft)

Blocklings : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blocklings](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blocklings)

Lootbags : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lootbags](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lootbags)

Gravestone : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod)

Chisel and bits : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bits-and-chisels](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bits-and-chisels)
